sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_hash (id UInt32, data String, hash_value FixedString(16));
UPDATE test_hash SET hash_value = sipHash128Reference(data, '\x02', 5) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, data, hex(hash_value) FROM test_hash WHERE hash_value = sipHash128Reference('bar', '\x03', 7);
CREATE TABLE hash_summary AS SELECT data, count() AS occurrences, hex(sipHash128Reference(data)) AS hash_summary FROM test_hash GROUP BY data;
